Cao Bing śõĻÁā≥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Bing (śõĻÁā≥). Son of Cao Xiong, had a fiefdom but died without heirs. Cao Bing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
